title: Zombies are strong together
description: Make Zombies Great Again Zombies are strong together
body:
Zombies are strong together

Zombies become more powerful

When zombies are hit, they may recover health, gain strength, move, or summon other zombies.

When zombies attack players, they may cause hunger, poisoning, slowing, weakness, or blindness.

After a zombie dies, it may summon other zombies.
